rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #5, REPORT, FEES
rulings.Rulings: Continued to April 19, 2011. A response was filed, but no bank account statements were filed. Counsel was to bring the statements Friday a.m., but as of 1:30 p.m. no statements had been received, which does not leave enough time for the Examiner to review the statements and prepare hearing notes. Since there is already a petition set for April 19 and April 5 is not available, this petition continued to be on calendar with the petition on April 19.
